description: Repo Market Desk - dedicated overnight-funding stress engine. NY Fed markets API (SOFR/TGCR/BGCR with volume-weighted p1/p25/p75/p99 percentiles + volume, SRF ops) + FRED (IORB with IOER splice, RRP + award, reserves, TGA, discount window, swap lines, ceiling). Computes the p99 tail (the Sep-2019 early-warning metric), full spread stack, facility buffers, calendar-adjusted context, episode ranking since 2018, and a 9-component 0-100 repo stress score with regime tripwires. data/repo-market.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Repo Market Desk - 13:35 UTC (after the NY Fed 8am ET reference-rate publication) and 21:35 UTC (post-close + H.4.1 Thursdays).
